title: antrophyum carnosum
intro: Antrophyum carnosum, also known as the Swamp Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antrophyum carnosum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and relieve various health complaints.
